title: Skopy copy by specified digest

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

How does that fail? I would expect `skopeo copy docker://mcr.microsoft.com/k8s/core/pause@sha256:406130851b87b942ba1575b0ca2665e5a0cabd7b816b919d084d24615d96c214 …` to work just fine.

You are right! I didn't realize that is supported in `docker-reference` syntax. We can consider adding to the man
 page

https://github.com/containers/image/blob/master/docs/containers-transports.5.md#dockerdocker-reference discusses tags vs. digests fairly extensively, and skopeo(1) already points to that man page. Is there some other place where that needs to go?
